trigger: Before starting a software project task that changes workflow assets
When planning, reviewing, or validating project-governance work

ask_user_question.evidence: Claude adapter can route user interaction through the host conversation, but this repository cannot prove a portable native AskUserQuestion tool across all Claude-compatible runtimes.
ask_user_question.degraded_mode: Use the host interaction channel and record degraded evidence when a native AskUserQuestion tool is unavailable.

sub_agent.evidence: Claude Code supports Agent-style delegation used by the workflow's Agent Team routing.

tool_calling.evidence: Claude Code runtime E2E uses filesystem/read tools and local validation commands.

browser.evidence: Browser automation depends on installed host/browser tooling, not the adapter entry itself.
browser.degraded_mode: Mark browser validation blocked or use an available browser plugin when the host exposes one.

mcp.evidence: MCP availability depends on user host configuration.
mcp.degraded_mode: Use local scripts and record MCP unavailable when no MCP server is configured.

git_hooks.evidence: Workflow installs and validates pre-commit, commit-msg, and post-commit hooks.

workflow_closure.evidence: Entry and Agent Team routing are strong, but AskUserQuestion, browser, and MCP remain host-dependent.

runtime_e2e.evidence: Local Claude Code command returned version 2.1.123.

target_cwd_e2e.evidence: Executed from project/e2e-test-project cwd and returned Test Project status with default-confirm permission mode.

agent_runtime_e2e.command: claude -p "In this project, read .governance/plan-tracker.md and answer exactly: E2E_STAGE=<current stage text>. Do not modify files." --permission-mode default --allowedTools Read --output-format text
agent_runtime_e2e.evidence: Real Claude Code runtime executed in project/e2e-test-project cwd and returned E2E_STAGE=立项与目标定义（第 1 阶段）.
